name: Chicken Style Seasoning -- the Good One
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together all ingredients except parsley until smooth.
2. Stir in the parsley and transfer to an airtight container.
Notes:
- Use this seasoning to make a quick chicken-like stock out of water when you have no vegetable stock on hand. Excellent for flavoring rice and as a soup base.
- Make a simple, easy, and tasty gravy by mixing water, seasoning, and miso (I prefer dark brown rice miso). Typical proportions: 1.5 cups water, 1 tablespoon seasoning, 2 teaspoons miso.
- Adjust seasonings to your taste. Right before serving the gravy, mix some starch (such as potato starch) with a bit of water until well combined, then add it to the gravy over medium heat to thicken. Continue adding starch until you achieve the desired thickness.
